description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named test that runs unit tests on pull requests, pushes to main and next branches, and on workflow dispatch. Use a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions and operating systems in parallel, canceling any in-progress runs for the same workflow and reference. For each test job, check out the code with submodules, create a Python environment with micromamba, build and install freud, and run a subset of tests with pytest. After all test jobs complete, run a final job on ubuntu-latest to verify that all tests succeeded.
